findings.title: Locale cookie missing Secure flag in production
findings.description: LanguageSwitcher.tsx sets the NEXT_LOCALE cookie without the 'Secure' flag. Low risk since this is a preference cookie, not a session token.

resolved.title: Fixed: renamed 'switchLanguage' to 'switchTo' in both en.json and vi.json to match component code
Fixed: replaced hardcoded aria-label with t('remove') in cart/page.tsx

positives: Translation file structure is well-organized with namespaced keys
Both en.json and vi.json have matching key structures (293 keys each)
Invalid locale cookie values handled gracefully with fallback to 'vi'
next-intl middleware correctly configured with localePrefix: 'never'
Root layout properly uses async getLocale/getMessages and sets html lang dynamically
Server components use getTranslations, client components use useTranslations
localStorage mirror of cookie provides fast client-side fallback
